title: Entertainment and Media Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Lasting forever; never ending.
rounds.answer: eternal
rounds.explanation: eternal: Lasting forever; never ending.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A strong feeling of fear or being very scared.
rounds.answer: terror
rounds.explanation: terror: A strong feeling of fear or being very scared.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Related to electricity or using electricity.
rounds.answer: electrical
rounds.explanation: electrical: Related to electricity or using electricity.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A time when something becomes popular or important again.
rounds.answer: revival

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A strong feeling of fear or being very scared.
rounds.answer: terror

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A perfect place where everything is good and everyone is happy.
rounds.answer: utopia

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: In ancient times, some people were pagan and worshipped different gods.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The admiral gave orders to the fleet before they set sail.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The loud thunder filled the children with terror.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Scroll of Selma, part 1': But a _____ led by the Confederacy sought to destroy them.
rounds.answer: revival
rounds.explanation: The text says: But a revival led by the Confederacy sought to destroy them.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Scroll of Selma, part 1': The symbols were strange — part _____, part familiar.
rounds.answer: pagan
rounds.explanation: The text says: The symbols were strange — part pagan, part familiar.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Scroll of Selma, part 1': "Maybe _____ influence mixed with native rituals," said another.
rounds.answer: Catholic
rounds.explanation: The text says: "Maybe Catholic influence mixed with native rituals," said another.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1: Vocabulary Expert Interview
rounds.target: In ancient times, some people were pagan and worshipped different gods.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3: Four-Minute Unit Talk
rounds.target: The admiral gave orders to the fleet before they set sail.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5: Explain and Respond
rounds.target: Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: I saw a funny commercial on TV about a new toy.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The electrical wires in the house help power the lights.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: We visited the cemetery to pay our respects to my great-grandfather.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'legacy' mean in this unit?
choices: Something that is passed down from the past, like traditions, stories, or values.
A person who follows a religion that is not one of the main world religions, often believing in many gods.
rounds.answer: Something that is passed down from the past, like traditions, stories, or values.
rounds.explanation: legacy: Something that is passed down from the past, like traditions, stories, or values.

rounds.prompt: What does 'characteristics' mean in this unit?
choices: A person who follows a religion that is not one of the main world religions, often believing in many gods.
The special qualities or features that make someone or something different.
rounds.answer: The special qualities or features that make someone or something different.
rounds.explanation: characteristics: The special qualities or features that make someone or something different.

rounds.prompt: What does 'pagan' mean in this unit?
choices: To be killed by being nailed to a cross, a method used a long time ago.
A person who follows a religion that is not one of the main world religions, often believing in many gods.
rounds.answer: A person who follows a religion that is not one of the main world religions, often believing in many gods.
rounds.explanation: pagan: A person who follows a religion that is not one of the main world religions, often believing in many gods.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'spartan'?
rounds.answer: Adjective
rounds.explanation: spartan is used as a adjective in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'cyanide'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: cyanide is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'dynasty'?
rounds.answer: Noun
rounds.explanation: dynasty is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: A person who follows a religion that is not one of the main world religions, often...
A high-ranking officer in the navy who commands ships and sailors.
Related to a system in the past where people worked for a lord in exchange for land and...

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: Something that is passed down from the past, like traditions, stories, or values.
A short video or audio message that promotes a product or service.
A perfect place where everything is good and everyone is happy.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: The special qualities or features that make someone or something different.
A person who creates cartoons, which are funny drawings or animations.
The name of a river in the United States; it can also refer to a town or a school.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: What does 'revival' mean?
choices: A high-ranking officer in the navy who commands ships and sailors.
A member of the Christian church that is led by the Pope.
A time when something becomes popular or important again.
To be killed by being nailed to a cross, a method used a long time ago.
rounds.answer: A time when something becomes popular or important again.
rounds.explanation: The revival of the old film made many people want to watch it again.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Scroll of Selma, part 1': There, a _____ was performed daily beneath the Great Tree.
rounds.answer: rehearsal
rounds.explanation: The text says: There, a rehearsal was performed daily beneath the Great Tree.

rounds.prompt: Choose the missing word from 'The Scroll of Selma, part 1': A few lines had survived in full: "In the Year of _____ Fire, the Monk of Selma led his disciples to the Valley of...
rounds.answer: Eternal
rounds.explanation: The text says: A few lines had survived in full: "In the Year of Eternal Fire, the Monk of Selma led his disciples to the Valley of Memory.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: What does 'rehearsal' mean?
choices: A person who follows a religion that is not one of the main world religions, often believing in many gods.
A special way of doing something that is done regularly or at certain times.
A time when something becomes popular or important again.
rounds.answer: A special way of doing something that is done regularly or at certain times.
rounds.explanation: Every morning, my family has a rehearsal of eating breakfast together.

rounds.prompt: What does 'apprentice' mean?
choices: A member of the Christian church that is led by the Pope.
A person who follows a religion that is not one of the main world religions, often believing in many gods.
A person who follows and learns from a teacher or leader.
A time when something becomes popular or important again.
rounds.answer: A person who follows and learns from a teacher or leader.
rounds.explanation: The apprentice listened carefully to the wise words of his teacher.

rounds.prompt: What does 'eternal' mean?
choices: A member of the Christian church that is led by the Pope.
A person who follows a religion that is not one of the main world religions, often believing in many gods.
To be killed by being nailed to a cross, a method used a long time ago.
rounds.answer: Lasting forever; never ending.
rounds.explanation: The love between a parent and child is often seen as eternal.
